chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT LARKANO 2nd Criminal Bail Application No.S- 107 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on M.A.No.1147/2025 (U/A). 2. For order on office objection “A”. 3. For order on M.A No.1148/2025 (E/A). 4. For hearing of bail application. 28.02.2025 Mr. Ahmed Bux Abro, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Muhammad Afzal Jagirani, Advocate for the applicant a/w applicant. ------------- 1. Urgency granted. 2. Overruled. 3. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 4&5. This is second bail application. Learned counsel for the applicant submits that due to non availability of concerned Mukhtiarkar the surety was not available hence, the applicant could not appear before the trial court as such he requests for protective bail in order to approach the trial court. Without touching the merits and demerits of the case. The applicant Sajjad Ali Baloch, is admitted to protective bail for a period of seven days in Crime No.186/2021 registered under Sections 364-A, 147, 148, 149 PPC, 3 Prevention of Trafficking in persons Act, 2018 registered at Police Station, City Usta Mohammad, District Jafferabad, Province of Balochistan in order to approach the Trial Court and surrender before it without apprehension of being arrested on his way. This Order is subject to the Applicant's furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs.10,000/- (Rupees Ten Thousands only) and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the learned Additional Registrar of this Court. This Order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of period of four days i.e. on 03.03.2025 or on the Applicant's surrendering himself before the concerned trial court whichever is earlier.

This Order is subject to the Applicant's furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs.10,000/- (Rupees Ten Thousands only) and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the learned Additional Registrar of this Court. This Order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of period of four days i.e. on 03.03.2025 or on the Applicant's surrendering himself before the concerned trial court whichever is earlier. The operation of NBWs if any, issued against the applicant shall remain suspended till then. The bail application stands disposed of. J U D G E
